verses.1: LORD, remember David and all his affliction,
verses.2: how he swore to the LORD,
verses.3: “Surely I will not come into the structure of my house,
verses.4: I will not give sleep to my eyes,
verses.5: until I find out a place for the LORD,
verses.6: Behold, we heard of it in Ephrathah.
verses.7: “We will go into his dwelling place.
verses.8: Arise, LORD, into your resting place,
verses.9: Let your priests be clothed with righteousness.
verses.11: The LORD has sworn to David in truth.
verses.12: If your children will keep my covenant,
verses.13: For the LORD has chosen Zion.
verses.15: I will abundantly bless her provision.
verses.16: I will also clothe her priests with salvation.
verses.17: I will make the horn of David to bud there.
verses.18: I will clothe his enemies with shame,
